panels.description: Wide shot: A dark, Victorian office desk covered in heavy parchment letters and a floor plan marked 'A', flickering gaslight casting long shadows over the paperwork.

bubbles.text: Deposit the fifty boxes in the ruined building marked 'A'. The ancient chapel is the site.

panels.description: Medium shot: Steam locomotive pulling into a rainy King's Cross station at night, Victorian laborers unloading heavy wooden crates, silhouettes of figures in coats.

bubbles.text: The delivery must be prompt. King's Cross, 4:30 tomorrow.

panels.description: Medium close-up: A gloved hand placing a heavy iron key on a dusty wooden table inside a dimly lit, decaying main hall of an old mansion.

bubbles.text: Keys left in the main hall as directed.

panels.description: Wide shot: A peaceful churchyard in Whitby, lush greenery, Mina Murray sitting on a stone bench writing in a diary, smiling as she watches Lucy nearby.

bubbles.text: 18 August. I am happy today. Lucy is better; the roses are returning to her cheeks.

panels.description: Medium shot: Lucy looking distressed but beautiful, sitting on the bench, hands clasped, telling her dream to Mina, soft dappled sunlight through tree branches.

bubbles.text: I didn't quite dream... I felt I was being pulled to the spot, afraid of something I couldn't name.

panels.description: Close-up: Lucy's eyes, looking ethereal and slightly haunted, reflecting a dark, distorted memory of red eyes and deep green water.

bubbles.text: Dogs howling everywhere. Something long and dark with red eyes... and then, sinking into deep green water.
